name: SHOUCHITE NO JUTSU (RISING EARTH HAND TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: F, H, Mas

You must be in direct contact with the ground to use this technique, which makes a large, earthen hand rise from the ground. The hand is 10 ft tall and 5 ft wide and cannot move. It has a Defense of 0, has 2 HP per level and is immune to earth damage. A creature weighing at least 2,000 lbs can destroy the hand simply by moving through it.

A creature moving towards the hand at high speed may make a Reflex save to avoid it, or suffer impact damage as though struck by a falling object of one size category larger than the impacting creature or object, with no save to avoid the damage. In this case, the hand suffers double the impact damage itself.

Mastery: You can spend 5 Chakra and double the material focus to create a second hand.
